transcript.text:
[Back in the 70's and the 80's]
[High schoolers going in for Finals]
[It's still the same today]
[This is commonly seen in Korea for those finishing up high school]
[But...]
[This has changed recently because of covid]
[Much more silent]
It's a difficult time...
4 to 6 hours of sleep
[These students had to adjust and overcome for the last 3 years]
[For those who are going through this...]
It's Tzuyang~!
[Really?]
[Actually?!]
Tzuyang's a legend!
[Tzuyang and Odaejang collaboration to show support]

[Sushi competition]
[A competition between these 2 teams]
I give up
I can't
[Will they just forfeit?]
[Happy Chuseok!] (Korean holiday)
[Suwon KT Wiz Park]
Hello everyone
I wore a school uniform today
Finals is coming up in a few months
So I prepared a content for the high school seniors
The KT athletes are on the bus behind me
[KT Odaejang]
[Wait...]
[It's comedian Choi Joon]
[Video from 2021.09.17]

[He's here to surprise Tzuyang]
It's my 3rd time meeting them today I've won the past 2 times
A total of 6 of them are here today
Please come out
Hello
[Nice to see KT Odaejang athletes again]
It's been a while
Hello
Hello
[Will Tzuyang notice?]
[Nope...]
[Did you forget about me...]
My name is Kang Baekho, the Power Boss from KT Odaejang
Health Boss, Yang Hongseok
I'm So Hyungjun, the pitcher at KT wiz and the Speed Boss
Hello, Kim Haejun from KT Sonic Boom

[Sticking with the fake story that he's a guard from the basketball team]
We asked him to come and he agreed
Park Younghyun, pitcher for KT wiz
I brought him out because he can eat more than me
So he will play a big part today
KT wiz outfielder, Bae Jungdae
-Did you guys watch the episode with Lee Kang In? -Yes
He was talking down on us, but he was exaggerating
They are very old-school
Who were you most disappointed in?
The 2 baseball players
Kang In lost the competition And this time, we brought more athletes
I think we have a good chance of winning today
I'm on an empty stomach today
You will get to see Tzuyang get defeated for once
She thinks otherwise

I'm a good eater, but Haejun can eat the most here
[She still has no idea]
I can eat more than Tzuyang
I can probably take her 1 on 1
[Still doesn't know]
I'm not sure if I can win against 6 people
Let's show them what we got
Formation after if we lose
We're in a different sport Do we form up too?
Do a separate one then
We are all one in sports
Are you guys okay with sushi?
-Isn't it your specialty? -No, I'm not good at eating rice
But she's on a different level
How many did you eat before?
240 pieces?

That's very similar to how many I can eat
Around how many do you think you can take?
-Haejun? -I can eat 160 pieces
How about 150 pieces each team?
Not bad
[Ordering on the phone]
Tzuyang is a well-known celebrity and there's a chance her phone number can get leaked
So there's this new feature
You can have 2 phone numbers in 1 phone Dual, dual, dual number
Dual number
It's really convenient if you're buying or selling to strangers Or even delivery
-I already use that -Is that so?
[Just laugh]
But that's why we're here today
1 phone 2 numbers Dual number
That's why we're doing a collaboration today

There are a lot of ads already about this
But from KT, you can have 2 numbers with 1 phone line
I use this myself
It's really nice to have it for commercial use and feel safe about not getting your personal information leaked
Look into it if this interests you
[She has already been using this]
[Ordering sushi]
150 pieces is kind of a lot...
I can't even imagine
How many can you guys actually eat?
In all seriousness
I can eat about 12 pieces or so
You look like Choi Joon
I get that a lot
I can sound like him too
[Time to reveal]

[It's been hard trying to trick Tzuyang...]
[Did she recognize him?]
He looks like him, right?
A little... Yes
[Panic mode]
Not really the face, but there's something
The vibe
[No way]
Who's better looking?
[Haejun wins]
[Does she really not know?]
-Do you know who he is? -Choi Joon!
A total of 300 pieces 150 pieces each team
KT Odaejang athletes have been doing great things for the community this year
A total of 2900km out of 5000km
We will do a competition today and the team that loses will give 350 sandwiches for the high school seniors

[We love that]
[So you can receive a total of 650km from today]
Let's go we got this!
Bon appetit
I'm a slow eater
Make sure to chew a lot
It's important
It's really delicious
This is way too much food
Looks small, but it's not
It's a lot of food
Do you know Choi Joon's phone number?
I think I do
Did you give him your dual number?
That feels a little weird
Do you guys find the need for dual number?

When we have to park our cars
Especially for top athletes like Haejun over there
Tell her about all the awards I received
MVP for every round Best shooter for 2021
He also played for the national team
He has a lot of fans
So I use 4 phones all with dual numbers So a total of 8 phone numbers for me
Octopus legs
How dare you say that to your superior
But we actually do use dual numbers
There's a lot of privacy when it comes to this feature
That's why I use that too
No wonder the superiors didn't have your number
Not sure if it's because I'm hungry But this tastes so good
Let's tag out
I'll show you an athlete's appetite

We normally don't drink soda either
But I will drink it just for your channel
Let's do a cheers
How tall are you?
178cm
[Oops]
Wait... I wanted to be honest
I'm pretty short for a basketball player
How tall are you?
195cm
But he's a great jump shooter
-My head will touch the ceiling if I jump -Can you show me?
But I'm eating right now
This is very cool It really is
What is this strange feeling?
Tzuyang's digestive system works very fast

If Park Jisung has 2 hearts,
Tzuyang has 2 stomachs Dual stomach
What is it in English?
It's embarrassing for me to say You say it
I'm a college student right now I didn't learn it yet
Can we make eye contact for 3 seconds?
[Do you not know me...?]
You're being serious, right?
Nevermind
Yum
Because you said I look like Choi Joon
It's not like that
But
[Is it time...?]
He does have that similar vibe
It's not like you don't know Choi Joon, right?

-You guys met before -In that one episode
It's rude to say people look like Choi Joon Who would like that?
I can do a karaoke microphone echo
[Almost as if he's a comedian...]
The echo was on max, right?
You're very talented
How different is your weight when you're off season?
Huge difference
Right?
Because I've been talking too much
About 10kgs?
-KT is saying they can call Choi Joon right now -Really?
[But I'm here...?]
Hello?
I can't believe it right now
She still doesn't know

[Why is she laughing?]
Tzuyang...
I'm Choi Joon...
[Still...?]
[Dummy...]
I thought you were like a doppelganger
[What the]
We were all wondering in the back if you were acting
Did you really not know?
No I didn't
I think you lost a lot of weight
That's true, but
The more it went on, the sadder I got
Very nice to see you again It's been a while
Pretty
[How can you forget Choi Joon]

Should we switch now?
[Still in shock...]
Because he lost weight
And the hair style
I watch your YouTube videos all the time
I thought you just looked like him
But someone that looks just like him?
It's okay, you did well
I laughed so hard that I'm not hungry anymore
How did I not know?
I believed in you
The athletes greeted and welcomed me when I met them earlier So I was in such a good mood
I'm happy now too
Did everybody recognize him?
[Everyone but you]
We all screamed

We are here today because the high school seniors now have been through covid since they were freshmen
They went through a hard time especially for those past 3 years
We are here to show support
Can you say a word, Choi Joon?
All of you have been doing a great job We sincerely hope that you get the results that you want
Turn your imagination into reality Goodbye
It must have been so hard because of covid
We hope you get the results you worked for
We hope all of you can get into your dream university with good grades
Seniors, you can do it!
I hope for good results You can do it!
Change?
One thing for sure is that we're the best eaters on our team
You need meat you said?
How much can you eat? Kilograms
My weight?

2.5kgs of meat?
Back in high school when I used to eat a lot
I used to be a big eater
You're good right now too
I'm starting to get full now
I'm just having a meal
Let's switch
We got this!
[Will Odaejang finally take the win?]
I can finish everything, but it will take a while
They only have a little bit left
I can usually eat more
But not after I did my diet
As for speed, it looks like we're going to win
I can eat everything but I take my time
For us, we just keep switching

We have to deliver the sandwiches now
It's for a good cause anyway, so let's just all enjoy it
Really?
No?
Can you share?
Really?
You guys are Odaejang
Can you explain what it is and what it is that you guys do
We are here for those who went through hard times because of the pandemic
We visited small restaurants to show support
We give our earnings to charity from restaurants to fire stations and etc
We do work related to those areas
A lot of good deeds
Good job
Good for you
[Shy]

I give up
What?
Why?
Tzuyang will be disappointed if I forfeit right now
Then if I eat this...
I'll eat it
I give up
I'm really full
I give up
-Same here -Me too
We ate a lot
Did you say you will come to watch us play?
The only time I've been to a baseball stadium was in America
This is a stadium too
Which team? Dodgers?
-Yankees -Right, the steak from New York

We'll get you a sky box
What's sky box?
There's even a grill in there
Everyone has forfeited from our team Even Baekho
We need to get moving now So we would appreciate it if the staff could give us a hand too
At least 1 each Thank you
[Everyone gets to take part]
No more steak tartare and eel
That's not eel That's beef
We have one person still eating and everyone is watching her
Let's talk about something so she can eat comfortably
Love life?
I've never heard about your love life
I am everyone's lover
If I say anything here, a lot of my fans will be hurt
Dual number for everyone's lover

I heard you do that to your fans
300km added if she finishes this
Let's give her a round of applause
300km from 1v6 sushi mukbang!
Miso soup too
Can we get more for this?
She had 6 of them...
We will double the earnings today So 600km
Really? Seriously?
350km for sandwiches and 300km for sushi
But doubled So a total of 950km
Let's go deliver the sandwiches
[Yushin High School in Paldal-gu]
It's Tzuyang!
[Tzuyang is here]
We brought 350 sandwiches here

The current senior class really went through it
It's nothing big, but I hope this can give them some energy to finish off strong
It hasn't been long since the midterm
The score was not that good
But I got to see the athletes and Tzuyang Even received sandwiches, so I feel very good
[The principal]
Thank you for the great gifts
Their bodies will be nourished, and they will study hard Thank you
[A surprise visit]
Hello It's your oppa Choi Joon
The seniors right now are very stressed, right?
Odaejang athletes, Tzuyang, and I want to show support
And deliver sandwiches and energy drinks Let's give them a hand!
[We support your future!]
They're at a time when they're most nervous and anxious
It really means a lot for the students when the celebrities and athletes physically came to show support

This really helps a lot
I will get into a good university after doing well on the finals
I will get into the school I want We got this!
As tough it was for the past years I wish you all great results
Keep on fighting!
Run! Odaejang! Fighting!
[I hope that the small happiness we shared today] [Gave strength to pursue further in life]
[KT Odaejang and Tzuyang will always be here to support you] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
